message:
fix: update 37 dependencies and fix golden vector test breakages

Bumps tokio 1.49→1.50, uuid 1.21→1.22, coset 0.4.1→0.4.2, toml 1.0.3→1.0.6,
and 33 others. Fixes 8 test failures caused by the updates:
- Operation signable bytes vectors: add u32 length prefix for optional strings
- Airtable manifest hash: recomputed after CBOR serialization change
- Manifest golden vectors: update expected op counts for airtable/jira/webhook-receiver
- Policy posture attestation: use fixed timestamps instead of Utc::now()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
